subcodes.first_line: O children of the Friend and heirs of Him Who conversed with God! Ye must forsake all that is in this world, taking hold of that which hath come unto you from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابناء الخلیل و وراث الکلیم لکم ان تدعوا ما فی الدنیا آخذین ما اتیکم من
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to Jews, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
